matrix.label: TED - Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are | Amy Cuddy | TED
matrix.title: Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are | Amy Cuddy | TED
matrix.testValue: Clean, high-confidence talk audio is useful as a baseline manual-caption case.

control.source: YouTube video - Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are | Amy Cuddy | TED - Title + description fallback
control.explanation: Repeated sentence openings appear throughout, including "our nonverbals govern", "ted ideas worth". Short phrase patterns repeat more than expected, such as "our nonverbals govern", "nonverbals govern how". Sentence rhythm has low burstiness and stays smoother than typical human drafts.
